2f9c0094-f1d1-47fe-b3eb-24e6e0aae64f.label: text_chunk
2f9c0094-f1d1-47fe-b3eb-24e6e0aae64f.text:
DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY

NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

I, _______________________________________, an individual official, employee, consultant, or subcontractor of or to _____________________ (the Authorized Entity), intending to be legally bound, hereby consent to the terms in this Agreement in consideration of my being granted conditional access to certain information, specified below, that is owned by, produced by, or in the possession of the United States Government.

4f84fec1-ddcb-4a0a-99a8-a99bd19e8cf6.label: text_chunk
4f84fec1-ddcb-4a0a-99a8-a99bd19e8cf6.text:
(Signer will acknowledge the category or categories of information that he or she may have access to, and the signer’s willingness to comply with the standards for protection by placing his or her initials in front of the applicable category or categories.)
Initials:
Protected Critical Infrastructure Information (PCII)

8472857b-1132-48bf-8021-bd1b30e82ceb.label: text_chunk
8472857b-1132-48bf-8021-bd1b30e82ceb.text: I attest that I am familiar with, and I will comply with all requirements of the PCII program set out in the Critical Infrastructure Information Act of 2002 (CII Act) (Title II, Subtitle B, of the Homeland Security Act of 2002, Public Law 107-296, 196 Stat. 2135, 6 USC 101 et seq.

7d91c192-2b2e-41e6-8e0e-e8c21ffd4f4c.label: text_chunk
7d91c192-2b2e-41e6-8e0e-e8c21ffd4f4c.text: ), as amended, the implementing regulations thereto (6 CFR Part 29), as amended, and the applicable PCII Procedures Manual, as amended, and with any such requirements that may be officially communicated to me by the PCII Program Manager or the PCII Program Manager’s designee.

be89c6cc-b861-4c00-a24a-4bea187589ed.label: text_chunk
be89c6cc-b861-4c00-a24a-4bea187589ed.text: Initials: Sensitive Security Information (SSI) I attest that I am familiar with, and I will comply with the standards for access, dissemination, handling, and safeguarding of SSI information as cited in this Agreement and in accordance with 49 CFR Part 1520, “Protection of Sensitive Security Information,” “Policies and Procedures for Safeguarding and Control of SSI,” as amended, and any supplementary guidance issued by an authorized official of the Department of Homeland Security.

a09da3e1-3336-418c-83c3-f3806c45650e.label: text_chunk
a09da3e1-3336-418c-83c3-f3806c45650e.text:
Initials: Other Sensitive but Unclassified (SBU)


As used in this Agreement, sensitive but unclassified information is an over-arching term that covers any information, not otherwise indicated above, which the loss of, misuse of, or unauthorized access to or modification of could adversely affect the national interest or the conduct of Federal programs, or the privacy to which individuals are entitled under Section 552a of Title 5, as amended,

64f2911a-0e3d-4f5f-8c78-f345c8e85496.label: text_chunk
64f2911a-0e3d-4f5f-8c78-f345c8e85496.text: but which has not been specifically authorized under criteria established by an Executive Order or an Act of Congress to be kept secret in the interest of national defense or foreign policy.

730e3592-99fe-4b58-9129-c8b0862c935e.label: text_chunk
730e3592-99fe-4b58-9129-c8b0862c935e.text: This includes information categorized by DHS or other government agencies as: For Official Use Only (FOUO); Official Use Only (OUO); Sensitive Homeland Security Information (SHSI); Limited Official Use (LOU); Law Enforcement Sensitive (LES); Safeguarding Information (SGI); Unclassified Controlled Nuclear Information (UCNI); and any other identifier used by other government agencies to categorize information as sensitive but unclassified.

725a4eab-6302-4b45-94c1-69faad6eab07.label: text_chunk
725a4eab-6302-4b45-94c1-69faad6eab07.text:
I attest that I am familiar with, and I will comply with the standards for access, dissemination, handling, and safeguarding of the information to which I am granted access as cited in this Agreement and in accordance with the guidance provided to me relative to the specific category of information.I understand and agree to the following terms and conditions of my access to the information indicated above:
1.

a0eacfd2-c475-40aa-8adf-695220fa20c9.label: text_chunk
a0eacfd2-c475-40aa-8adf-695220fa20c9.text: I hereby acknowledge that I have received a security indoctrination concerning the nature and protection of information to which I have been provided conditional access, including the procedures to be followed in ascertaining whether other persons to whom I contemplate disclosing this information have been approved for access to it, and that I understand these procedures.2.

3621398d-1750-4ef2-b4e3-d710c4bdd7eb.label: text_chunk
3621398d-1750-4ef2-b4e3-d710c4bdd7eb.text: By being granted conditional access to the information indicated above, the United States Government has placed special confidence and trust in me and I am obligated to protect this information from unauthorized disclosure, in accordance with the terms of this Agreement and the laws, regulations, and directives applicable to the specifi c categories of information to which I am granted access.3.

79e5353c-309b-438c-b909-cc42567d7310.label: text_chunk
79e5353c-309b-438c-b909-cc42567d7310.text: I attest that I understand my responsibilities and that I am familiar with and will comply with the standards for protecting such information that I may have access to in accordance with the terms of this Agreement and the laws, regulations, and/or directives applicable to the specifi c categories of information to which I am granted access.

8dfa9f23-cf72-4468-8635-30efd7cb0962.label: text_chunk
8dfa9f23-cf72-4468-8635-30efd7cb0962.text:
I understand that the United States Government may conduct inspections, at any time or place, for the purpose of ensuring compliance with the conditions for access, dissemination, handling and safeguarding information under this Agreement.DHS Form 11000-6 (08-04)
Page 1
4. I will not disclose or release any information provided to me pursuant to this Agreement without proper authority or authorization.

6596fe91-6c2a-4f47-89b0-48afd7214b48.label: text_chunk
6596fe91-6c2a-4f47-89b0-48afd7214b48.text: Should situations arise that warrant the disclosure or release of such information I will do so only under approved circumstances and in accordance with the laws, regulations, or directives applicable to the specific categories of information. I will honor and comply with any and all dissemination restrictions cited or verbally relayed to me by the proper authority.5.

1c31c359-6e6a-40b5-a58d-b6446e697c47.label: text_chunk
1c31c359-6e6a-40b5-a58d-b6446e697c47.text: (a) For PCII - (1) Upon the completion of my engagement as an employee, consultant, or subcontractor under the contract, or the completion of my work on the PCII Program, whichever occurs first, I will surrender promptly to the PCII Program Manager or his designee, or to the appropriate PCII officer, PCII of any type whatsoever that is in my possession.

a1fb9e13-7993-46b4-aafb-500d0f3b16ea.label: text_chunk
a1fb9e13-7993-46b4-aafb-500d0f3b16ea.text: (2) If the Authorized Entity is a United States Government contractor performing services in support of the PCII Program, I will not request, obtain, maintain, or use PCII unless the PCII Program Manager or Program Manager’s designee has first made in writing, with respect to the contractor, the certification as provided for in Section 29.8(c) of the implementing regulations to the CII Act, as amended.

46657c39-fef8-49ff-be59-3b4dbed6ac63.label: text_chunk
46657c39-fef8-49ff-be59-3b4dbed6ac63.text: (b) For SSI and SBU - I hereby agree that material which I have in my possession and containing information covered by this Agreement, will be handled and safeguarded in a manner that affords sufficient protection to prevent the unauthorized disclosure of or inadvertent access to such information, consistent with the laws, regulations, or directives applicable to the specific categories of information.

bf3d4218-42b4-465e-a643-57b8cdaa66a5.label: text_chunk
bf3d4218-42b4-465e-a643-57b8cdaa66a5.text:
I agree that I shall return all information to which I have had access or which is in my possession 1) upon demand by an authorized individual; and/or 2) upon the conclusion of my duties, association, or support to DHS; and/or 3) upon the determination that my official duties do not require further access to such information.6.

 I hereby agree that I will not alter or remove markings, which indicate a category of information or require specific handling instructions,

c3077811-a6dd-412c-b8c4-bc2aa1598443.label: text_chunk
c3077811-a6dd-412c-b8c4-bc2aa1598443.text: from any material I may come in contact with, in the case of SSI or SBU, unless such alteration or removal is consistent with the requirements set forth in the laws, regulations, or directives applicable to the specific category of information or, in the case of PCII, unless such alteration or removal is authorized by the PCII Program Manager or the PCII Program Manager’s designee.

7016b172-cd69-4e20-b38b-340533d5ed91.label: text_chunk
7016b172-cd69-4e20-b38b-340533d5ed91.text: I agree that if I use information from a sensitive document or other medium, I will carry forward any markings or other required restrictions to derivative products, and will protect them in the same matter as the original.7.

45a0ba38-cdea-4a56-98e0-674751699093.label: text_chunk
45a0ba38-cdea-4a56-98e0-674751699093.text:
I hereby agree that I shall promptly report to the appropriate official, in accordance with the guidance issued for the applicable category of information, any loss, theft, misuse, misplacement, unauthorized disclosure, or other security violation, I have knowledge of and whether or not I am personally involved.

 I also understand that my anonymity will be kept to the extent possible when reporting security violations.8.

92f42e74-5b34-404f-8226-89db667d836b.label: text_chunk
92f42e74-5b34-404f-8226-89db667d836b.text: If I violate the terms and conditions of this Agreement, such violation may result in the cancellation of my conditional access to the information covered by this Agreement. This may serve as a basis for denying me conditional access to other types of information, to include classified national security information.9.

d299cccd-bf9e-4d8f-a2e5-09e385e0c899.label: text_chunk
d299cccd-bf9e-4d8f-a2e5-09e385e0c899.text: (a) With respect to SSI and SBU, I hereby assign to the United States Government all royalties, remunerations, and emoluments that have resulted, will result, or may result from any disclosure, publication, or revelation of the information not consistent with the terms of this Agreement.

25c9fc5a-20ad-4df3-aa2c-3621ecdceecd.label: text_chunk
25c9fc5a-20ad-4df3-aa2c-3621ecdceecd.text: (b) With respect to PCII I hereby assign to the entity owning the PCII and the United States Government, all royalties, remunerations, and emoluments that have resulted, will result, or may result from any disclosure, publication, or revelation of PCII not consistent with the terms of this Agreement.10. This Agreement is made and intended for the benefit of the United States Government and may be enforced by the United States Government or the Authorized Entity.

dd9a96f7-9255-4a0e-b29d-85708311dd2f.label: text_chunk
dd9a96f7-9255-4a0e-b29d-85708311dd2f.text: By granting me conditional access to information in this context, the United States Government and, with respect to PCII, the Authorized Entity, may seek any remedy available to it to enforce this Agreement including, but not limited to, application for a court order prohibiting disclosure of information in breach of this Agreement.

2a25b8d5-ccc1-409f-ac9e-96fa79235503.label: text_chunk
2a25b8d5-ccc1-409f-ac9e-96fa79235503.text: I understand that if I violate the terms and conditions of this Agreement, I could be subjected to administrative, disciplinary, civil, or criminal action, as appropriate, under the laws, regulations, or directives applicable to the category of information involved and neither the United States Government nor the Authorized Entity have waived any statutory or common law evidentiary privileges or protections that they may assert in any administrative or court proceeding to protect any sensitive information to which I have been given conditional access under the terms of this Agreement.

843268d5-0125-4c15-a2a0-7681957e54a1.label: text_chunk
843268d5-0125-4c15-a2a0-7681957e54a1.text:
DHS Form 11000-6 (08-04)
Page 2
DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT Acknowledgement Typed/Printed Name: Government/Department/Agency/Business Address  Telephone Number: I make this Agreement in good faith, without mental reservation or purpose of evasion. Signature: WITNESS: Typed/Printed Name: Government/Department/Agency/Business Address  Telephone Number: Signature:

1aa58baa-8e84-4a25-badb-3d00b6fb5d4b.label: text_chunk
1aa58baa-8e84-4a25-badb-3d00b6fb5d4b.text: This form is not subject to the requirements of P.L. 104-13, “Paperwork Reduction Act of 1995” 44 USC, Chapter 35.11. Unless and until I am released in writing by an authorized representative of the Department of Homeland Security (if permissible for the particular category of information), I understand that all conditions and obligations imposed upon me by this Agreement apply during the time that I am granted conditional access, and at all times thereafter.12.

61271f2f-18bc-49da-aa0f-d7d5346cb910.label: text_chunk
61271f2f-18bc-49da-aa0f-d7d5346cb910.text: Each provision of this Agreement is severable. If a court should find any provision of this Agreement to be unenforceable, all other provisions shall remain in full force and effect.13. My execution of this Agreement shall not nullify or affect in any manner any other secrecy or non-disclosure Agreement which I have executed or may execute with the United States Government or any of its departments or agencies.14.

9cd86bfd-3340-478a-afbe-c77a695d8125.label: text_chunk
9cd86bfd-3340-478a-afbe-c77a695d8125.text:
These restrictions are consistent with and do not supersede, conflict with, or otherwise alter the employee obligations, rights, or liabilities created by Executive Order No.

 12958, as amended; Section 7211 of Title 5, United States Code (governing disclosures to Congress); Section 1034 of Title 10, United States Code, as amended by the Military Whistleblower Protection Act (governing disclosure to Congress by members of the military);

cc70dd36-e990-4b23-82e0-231ab41ee337.label: text_chunk
cc70dd36-e990-4b23-82e0-231ab41ee337.text:
Section 2302(b)(8) of Title 5, United States Code, as amended by the Whistleblower Protection Act (governing disclosures of illegality, waste, fraud, abuse or public health or safety threats); the Intelligence Identities Protection Act of 1982 (50 USC 421 et seq.

)

6a4177b9-6bc4-44b6-89c6-8068d7629294.label: text_chunk
6a4177b9-6bc4-44b6-89c6-8068d7629294.text: (governing disclosures that could expose confidential Government agents); and the statutes which protect against disclosure that may compromise the national security, including Sections 641, 793, 794, 798, and 952 of Title 18, United States Code, and Section 4(b) of the Subversive Activities Act of 1950 (50 USC 783(b)).

480b705d-a412-4a88-a3b0-d94900439085.label: text_chunk
480b705d-a412-4a88-a3b0-d94900439085.text: The definitions, requirements, obligations, rights, sanctions, and liabilities created by said Executive Order and listed statutes are incorporated into this agreement and are controlling.15. Signing this Agreement does not bar disclosures to Congress or to an authorized official of an executive agency or the Department of Justice that are essential to reporting a substantial violation of law.16. I represent and warrant that I have the authority to enter into this Agreement.17.

b5cb75bc-a005-4a3e-823e-a8fa4b5dbab7.label: text_chunk
b5cb75bc-a005-4a3e-823e-a8fa4b5dbab7.text: I have read this Agreement carefully and my questions, if any, have been answered. I acknowledge that the briefing officer has made available to me any laws, regulations, or directives referenced in this document so that I may read them at this time, if I so choose.DHS Form 11000-6 (08-04) Email completed form to ITDSPORTALACCESS@cbp.dhs.gov.Page 3

properties.entity_description: The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) is a United States federal agency responsible for ensuring the nation's safety and security, particularly in relation to immigration, border security, and disaster response.
The federal government of the United States, which includes various departments and agencies responsible for national governance and public administration.

properties.relationship_description: The Department of Homeland Security is a federal agency that operates under the authority of the United States Government, thus it is overseen by the government.

properties.relationship_description: Sensitive but unclassified information is related to Section 552a of Title 5 as it pertains to the privacy rights of individuals and the handling of sensitive information by federal agencies.

properties.relationship_description: The PCII Program Manager is responsible for overseeing the PCII program, indicating a direct management relationship between the two entities.

The Department of Homeland Security is responsible for issuing regulations and guidance regarding the handling and safeguarding of Sensitive Security Information (SSI), indicating a regulatory relationship between the two entities.

properties.entity_description: Section 552a of Title 5 is a legal provision that outlines the privacy rights of individuals and governs the handling of personal information by federal agencies.

properties.relationship_description: The Agreement allows for disclosures to Congress regarding substantial violations of law, indicating a relationship of oversight and accountability.

properties.entity_description: An Act of Congress is a statute enacted by the United States Congress. It represents a formal law passed by both the House of Representatives and the Senate and is signed by the President. Acts of Congress can cover a wide range of issues and are essential for the functioning of the federal government.

For Official Use Only (FOUO) is a designation used by the U.S. government to identify sensitive information that is not classified but should be restricted to authorized personnel to protect privacy and security.

Official Use Only (OUO) is a designation for information that is sensitive and should not be released to the public, although it is not classified. It is intended for use by government officials and employees.
Sensitive Homeland Security Information (SHSI) refers to information that, if disclosed, could harm national security or the safety of individuals. It is protected under various laws and regulations.
Limited Official Use (LOU) is a classification for information that is sensitive and should be shared only with specific individuals or groups within the government.

Law Enforcement Sensitive (LES) is a designation for information that is sensitive to law enforcement operations and investigations, and its disclosure could compromise ongoing investigations or the safety of individuals.
Safeguarding Information (SGI) refers to sensitive information related to the protection of critical infrastructure and national security, which requires special handling and protection.

Unclassified Controlled Nuclear Information (UCNI) is a category of information that is unclassified but requires protection from unauthorized disclosure due to its potential impact on national security and nuclear safety.

properties.relationship_description: DHS is responsible for categorizing information, including FOUO, as part of its role in managing sensitive information.
Conditional Access may restrict the type of Information that can be accessed based on compliance with the Agreement.

properties.entity_description: Any data or knowledge that can be communicated or accessed, which may include classified national security information and other types of sensitive information.

The summary of the relationships is as follows:

1. **Sensitive Security Information (SSI) and the Department of Homeland Security (DHS)**: The DHS is responsible for issuing regulations and guidance on the handling and safeguarding of SSI, establishing a regulatory relationship between these entities.

2. **Regulation and the Department of Homeland Security (DHS)**: The DHS's role in regulating SSI further emphasizes its authority and responsibility in ensuring the proper management of sensitive information.

3. **PCII Program and the CII Act**: The PCII Program operates under the guidelines of the Critical Infrastructure Information (CII) Act, which outlines the protocols for managing critical infrastructure information, indicating a structured relationship governed by legal frameworks.

4. **Regulation and the PCII Program**: The PCII Program's adherence to the CII Act highlights its compliance with regulatory standards for critical infrastructure information management.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the interconnectedness of regulatory frameworks and programs designed to protect sensitive and critical information within the jurisdiction of the Department of Homeland Security.
community_summary.5:
The relationships outlined involve key entities such as Executive Orders, Acts of Congress, Authorizations, and Agreements, highlighting their interconnected roles in governance.

1. **Executive Order and Act of Congress**: An Executive Order is a legal instrument that can be issued under the authority of an Act of Congress. Both serve as governing tools for actions related to national defense and foreign policy.

2. **Executive Order and Agreement**: The definitions, requirements, and obligations established by an Executive Order are incorporated into an Agreement, which means that the Executive Order's stipulations become controlling within the context of that Agreement.

3. **Authorization and Executive Order**: Similar to the first relationship, an Authorization allows for the issuance of an Executive Order under the legal framework provided by an Act of Congress, reinforcing the connection between these legal instruments.

Overall, these relationships emphasize the legal hierarchy and the procedural connections between Executive Orders, Acts of Congress, Authorizations, and Agreements, illustrating how they collectively shape governance in matters of national importance.

community_summary.53: The CalOES Project is a significant initiative focused on infrastructure improvements, specifically involving the repairs to Westward Beach Road. The project has a defined timeline, with the completion of the design phase for the Malibu Road slope repairs scheduled for Summer 2022. This timeline underscores the project's progress and its connection to the specific location of Westward Beach Road, highlighting the importance of these repairs in enhancing the area's infrastructure.
community_summary.54: The Point Dume Decomposed Granite Walkway Repair Project is directly linked to the Woolsey Fire, which caused significant damage to the sidewalk sections. This event necessitated the initiation of the repair project to restore the affected areas. The relationship highlights the impact of the Woolsey Fire on local infrastructure, emphasizing the need for subsequent repair efforts.
